# Taylor (NotGreg) — Opportunities — February 17, 2026

---

## 1. Payment Processing Referral Income
**What it is:** Dax introduces business owners to Taylor. Taylor closes the deal and installs his payment processing system. Dax earns lifetime residuals on that account — Taylor splits his monthly take indefinitely.

Taylor referenced a UGA student earning ~$12,000/month this way. The ask is just introductions — Dax doesn't need to know anything about the product.

**Dax's read:** Interesting. Not enough time to get into specifics. Defer to a follow-up conversation. Requires credibility research first.

**Status:** Deferred

---

## 2. Stripe → NMI/Authorized.net Replacement
**What it is:** Taylor wants to replace DD's Stripe payment gateway with his processing system. He says he can match rates and handle API/integration needs.

**Dax's read:** High friction. DD has custom-built everything with APIs. Not a decision Dax can make unilaterally — needs Zach. Probably a no.

**Status:** Not actionable

---

## 3. Discord Building Exchange
**What it is:** Dax walks Taylor through how DD's Discord is structured and how to monetize a server. In return, Taylor provides free business and banking counsel — credit structure, when to use ACH vs. wire, business finance basics.

**Dax's read:** Willing to do it. Easy and low-commitment. Dax's caveat: Taylor has to actually demonstrate there's a community worth building for — needs to find an audience first before Dax invests time into advising on the Discord architecture.

**Status:** Open — at Dax's discretion

---

## 4. Live Music Discord Thread
**What it is:** Taylor is building a Discord and app for live music/concerts. Wants to thread concert announcements into DD when his app goes live.

**Dax's read:** No action needed now. Revisit only if Taylor actually launches and has a real audience.

**Status:** Parked

---

## 5. Bookmaking / Student Portfolio
**What it is:** Taylor offered to set Dax up with a portfolio — front Dax money to run lines of credit for people Dax trusts, with Dax managing bets and keeping splits.

**Dax's read:** No. Dax has history with this and explicitly prefers to stay out of it.

**Status:** Off the table
